allow: Bash(osascript -e 'display notification "Claude가 응답을 완료했습니다." with title "Claude Code" sound name "Glass"')
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(json.dumps\(json.loads\(l\), indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)\) for l in sys.stdin]")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) if 'summary' in str\(obj\).lower\(\) or 'compact' in str\(obj\).lower\(\): print\(json.dumps\(obj, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)[:500]\) print\('---'\) except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: line = line.strip\(\) if not line: continue try: obj = json.loads\(line\) t = obj.get\('type',''\) if 'compact' in t.lower\(\) or 'compact' in str\(obj.get\('subtype',''\)\).lower\(\): print\(json.dumps\(obj, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)[:800]\) print\('---'\) except: pass ")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys; data=sys.stdin.read\(\); print\(data[-500:] if len\(data\)>500 else data\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', d['version']\); print\('main:', d.get\('main'\)\); print\('exports:', d.get\('exports'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', d['version']\); print\('deps:', json.dumps\(d.get\('dependencies', {}\), indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c " import sys data = sys.stdin.read\(\) lines = data.strip\(\).split\('\\n'\) for line in lines: if line.startswith\('{'\) or line.startswith\('Error'\): print\(line[:300]\) ")
